aseoha.gui.coord.title: TARDIS Coordinates
item.aseoha.majestic_tale_disc.desc: The Majestic Tale (Of A Madman In A Box)
mixin.sonic.modes.info.set_coords: Right clicking in the world will set the attuned Tardis's destination coordinates to the right clicked position, right clicking after the HADS have been triggered will force the TARDIS to land
tooltip.aseoha.deadlocker: Toggles the deadlock state of the attuned TARDIS
tooltip.aseoha.latinum: Incredibly valuable, maybe you can buy something with it?
tooltip.part.upgrades/atrium.description:
Takes blocks with the TARDIS exterior 
Consult the ASEOHA Manual for more information
tooltip.part.upgrades/dynamic_coordinate: Makes the TARDIS monitor update flight position while flying
aseoha.k9.tame: K-9 Mark III Powering on Master
